methods.method_name: on-station water quality measuring instrument, the Quanta multiprobe (HYDROLAB)
survey data of the Ministry of Environment
naturally dried the samples fixed in 99% ethanol
coated them using an ion-coating instrument (Hitachi Japan, E-1030)
examined them using the SEM (Hitachi Japan, S-4300)
classified them using the classification techniques of Pestalozzi (1968) and Pascher (1990)
